name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — one plugin with everything: SDK install + auth, feature gates / configs / kill switches, A/B experiments, in-app bug reports, i18n. Slash-command namespaces are `/shipeasy:install`, `/shipeasy:bugs:*`, `/shipeasy:flags:*`, `/shipeasy:experiments:*`, `/shipeasy:i18n:*`.
